headline: Paramount CTO steps down
summary: Phil Wiser helped guide AI adoption at the media firm. His departure comes less than a month after Paramount’s Warner Bros. Discovery acquisition.

raw.headline: Paramount CTO steps down
raw.summary: Phil Wiser helped guide AI adoption at the media firm. His departure comes less than a month after Paramount’s Warner Bros. Discovery acquisition.

headline: 9 national TV publishers join initiative to address industry fragmentation
summary: Industry giants, including Paramount and NBCUniversal, have teamed with OpenAP to introduce a standardized way to activate and measure campaigns.
